name: Dream incubation temple: an oneiric chamber where the sleeper receives oracular dreams. FSPLIT: sleep splits consciousness into the waking self (body on the temple floor) and the dream self (wandering the oneiric realm). FFUSE: awakening reconstitutes the two selves — the dream memory integrates into waking knowledge. VINIT: the empty temple before the sleeper enters. TANCH: the temple walls — the boundary of incubation. AFWD: falling asleep (descent into dream). AREV: waking (ascent from dream). ENGAGR: lucid dreaming — simultaneously awake and asleep, the dreamer knows they dream.

phase_0.domain_name: Dream incubation temple: an oneiric chamber where the sleeper receives oracular dreams. FSPLIT: sleep splits consciousness into the waking self (body on the temple floor) and the dream self (wandering the oneiric realm). FFUSE: awakening reconstitutes the two selves — the dream memory integrates into waking knowledge. VINIT: the empty temple before the sleeper enters. TANCH: the temple walls — the boundary of incubation. AFWD: falling asleep (descent into dream). AREV: waking (ascent from dream). ENGAGR: lucid dreaming — simultaneously awake and asleep, the dreamer knows they dream.

VINIT.justification: void/uninitialized state before any dream activity

TANCH.justification: the boundary that contains the incubation system

AFWD.justification: forward morphism from waking to dream state

AREV.justification: reverse morphism from dream back to waking

CLINK.justification: composition of actions: entering, sleeping, dreaming, waking

FSPLIT.justification: splits consciousness into waking self (body on floor) and dream self (wandering oneiric realm)

FFUSE.justification: reconstitutes the two selves, integrating dream memory into waking knowledge

ENGAGR.justification: paradox: simultaneously awake and asleep, dreamer knows they dream

IFIX.justification: permanent irreversible record of the dream

phase_3.void_description: empty temple before any sleeper enters
phase_3.both_description: lucid dreaming — simultaneously awake and asleep

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: dreamer recognizes self as about to incubate a dream
Step 2 AREV: sleeper lies down, descends into sleep
Step 3 FSPLIT: sleep splits consciousness into waking self and dream self
Step 4 AFWD: dream self ascends into the oneiric realm
Step 5 FFUSE: awakening fuses the two selves, integrating dream memory
Step 6 CLINK: the sequence of incubation ritual is composed
Step 7 IFIX: dream is recorded in a journal
Step 8 IMSCRIB: dreamer recognizes self as having completed the incubation

phase_6.post_cycle_state: waking consciousness with integrated dream memory
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the cycle conserves the dreamer's identity and memory integration
